agentStop.bash: if command -v powershell.exe >/dev/null 2>&1; then powershell.exe -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .github/hooks/play-agent-stop-sound.ps1 >/dev/null 2>&1; elif command -v powershell >/dev/null 2>&1; then powershell -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .github/hooks/play-agent-stop-sound.ps1 >/dev/null 2>&1; fi
